name: How much does generative engine optimization cost?
description: Costs range from a targeted audit to an ongoing program, depending on how much content, schema, and measurement work is needed.

mainEntity.name: How much does generative engine optimization cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: GEO costs vary widely depending on whether you need a one-time audit, content updates, technical implementation, or ongoing optimization. A simple page-level cleanup is much cheaper than a full site program with schema, content production, and measurement. The best value usually comes from starting with a focused set of high-intent pages rather than trying to optimize everything at once.
acceptedAnswer.description: Costs range from a targeted audit to an ongoing program, depending on how much content, schema, and measurement work is needed.
